case_title: WEATHERBY, GRETA ERIN et al VS SENK, LAURA JEAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,395.00 FILED BY WEATHERBY, GRETA ERIN SHIRLEY, AMY ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT SENK, LAURA JEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
